Article.title: Article
Article.description: Represents a blog post or article.

slug.description: The URL-friendly slug for the article.

excerpt.description: A short summary of the article.

content.description: The full content of the article.

date.description: The publication date of the article.

tags.description: A list of tags associated with the article.

imageUrl.description: The full URL of the article's feature image, hosted on GitHub.

Painting.title: Painting
Painting.description: Represents a single painting in the gallery.

slug.description: The URL-friendly slug for the painting.

description.description: The story or description behind the painting.

year.description: The year the painting was created.

imageUrl.description: The full URL of the painting's image.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the painting was added.
